Name: LOCATION_CATEGORY_PUTAWAY
Description:
PUTAWAY

Makes use of the MasterItem EnforceCategoryMatchInLocations settings to ensure that users putaway to a Location with a category matching the MasterItem's category. If EnforceCategoryMatchInLocations is not set, it defaults to false and category matching will not be enforced

The logic is based on the EnforceCategoryMatchInLocations property on MasterItem. Make sure to set this to enforce the behavior. The categories of Locations and MasterItems must be the same also.
Author: Josh
